archetype: Swiss Luxury Fintech (Mix of Archetype 4 and 5)
core_concept: Dark Fintech with an editorial edge. Combining hyper-modern stark layouts with 'Instrument Serif' for a premium, institutional feel contrasting with vibrant 'Acid Green' accents.

layout.spacing_system: Use generous spacing inside containers (p-6, p-8). Grid gaps should be gap-6.
layout.dashboard_grid: Grid mode 'Control Room'. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Summary cards are col-span-1. Charts take col-span-2 or col-span-3. Transactions list takes full width or remaining cols.
layout.surface_styles: Cardless or 'Grid Borders' look. Use bg-[#121215] with 1px solid border-[#27272A]. Max border-radius: rounded-xl for outer cards, rounded-md for inner elements.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#D4FF00] text-black hover:bg-[#B3D600] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-semibold transition-all. Secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded-full px-6 py-2.
components.cards: Minimalist. No heavy drop shadows. Rely on 1px borders. Flex-col layout. padding: p-6. Heading in font-sans text-sm text-zinc-400, Value in font-serif text-4xl.
components.alerts: Negative Balance: bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/20 text-red-400 p-4 rounded-xl. Goal Deadline: bg-amber-500/10 border border-amber-500/20 text-amber-400. Use Lucide icons (AlertCircle).
components.charts: Recharts. Grid lines: stroke='#27272a'. Axis text: fill='#A1A1AA' font-size='12px'. Tooltip: custom backdrop-blur-md bg-[#121215]/90 border border-[#27272A] p-3 rounded-lg. BarChart: Income uses fill='#D4FF00', Expense uses fill='#FF443A'. PieChart: highly saturated distinct colors for categories.
components.modals: Shadcn Dialog. Overlay: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm. Content: bg-[#121215] border border-[#27272A]. Form fields: bg-[#050505] border-[#27272A] focus:border-[#D4FF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4FF00].
components.badges: Pill-shaped. Category tags: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs. Status tags: bg-[#D4FF00]/10 text-[#D4FF00] (income) or bg-[#FF443A]/10 text-[#FF443A] (expense).
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs customized. List: bg-[#050505] border border-[#27272A] p-1 rounded-full. Trigger: rounded-full data-[state=active]:bg-[#27272A] data-[state=active]:text-white text-zinc-400.

interactions.hover: Interactive cards should slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and border lightens to border-zinc-600. transition-all duration-300.
interactions.animations: Use Framer Motion for staggered list entrances. React CountUp for dashboard numbers. Progress bars (Metas tab) should animate width from 0 on load.

testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. Examples: login-btn, dashboard-tab, new-transaction-btn, export-csv-btn, export-pdf-btn, delete-transaction-[id].

media.description: Abstract dark 3D geometric shapes with cinematic lighting. Use as the left-side cover image on the split Auth screen.
Premium abstract data visualization background. Can be used as a subtle background image for the top summary cards (with low opacity, e.g., opacity-10) to add texture.

instructions_to_main_agent: Tech Stack: React JS (NOT TS!), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI primitives, Recharts, Lucide React, Framer Motion.
Install needed libraries: yarn add recharts framer-motion lucide-react react-countup date-fns papaparse js-cookie
Setup Tailwind: Customize tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (background: #050505, primary: #D4FF00, etc.) and fonts (font-serif: 'Instrument Serif', font-sans: 'Plus Jakarta Sans').
Fonts: Add the provided import_url to index.css and apply 'font-sans bg-background text-text_primary' to the body.
Auth Screen: Create a split layout. Use the 'auth_background' image on one side. Implement email/password login and signup forms.
Dashboard Navigation: Include a Header with Logo ('FinançasPro'), Sync indicator (spinning icon or green dot when synced), and Logout (showing user email).
Dashboard Summary: Render Income, Expense, and Balance cards. Use 'Instrument Serif' for the large numbers to give an editorial, high-end feel.
Alerts Panel: Build a section that conditionally shows alerts if balance < 0 or if any goal deadline is <= 30 days.
Tabs: Implement Lista, Gráficos, and Metas tabs.
Transactions (Lista): Add month/period filter, transaction list with category badges, and delete button. Include 'New Transaction' modal.
Charts (Gráficos): Use Recharts. BarChart for monthly income vs expenses. PieChart for expenses by category. Apply dark mode styling (stroke='#27272A').
Goals (Metas): Render cards with animated progress bars (Framer Motion). Include 'New Goal' modal with emoji picker (🎯 🏠 ✈️ 🚗 📱 🎓 💍 🛡️ 💻 🌴) and 'Deposit' modal to add funds to a goal.
Export: Implement CSV export (BRL format with BOM, can use papaparse or custom blob) and PDF export (using window.print() triggered via a specialized print-only CSS layout or just calling print()).
Notifications: Use Sonner or custom Toast for feedback (login success, transaction added, goal created, etc.).
Testing: Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs). This is strict.
Language: The entire UI must be in Portuguese-BR (pt-BR).
